fixture: 054_default_and_missing_required

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE widgets (id INTEGER NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'x')
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets (id) VALUES (1)
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 0A000]: INSERT execution does not yet synthesize DEFAULT values for omitted column "name"

statement 3:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE widgets_req (id INTEGER NOT NULL, code VARCHAR(12))
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 4:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets_req (code) VALUES ('x')
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 23502] at 1:1 (offset 0): INSERT omits required column "id"

statement 5:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets_req DEFAULT VALUES
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 23502] at 1:1 (offset 0): DEFAULT VALUES has no value for required column "id"
